message:
test(core): property-based tests for output_compression, concurrent_map, sharded_counter (77 tests)

Three new proptest files covering modules that previously lacked property-based test coverage:

- proptest_output_compression (30 passing + 1 ignored regression):
  edit_distance properties (symmetry, identity, triangle inequality, upper bound),
  lines_similar properties, template extract/reconstruct roundtrip,
  compress/decompress lossless roundtrip, stats invariants, serde roundtrips.
  Found and documented a lossy decompress bug with high similarity_threshold.

- proptest_concurrent_map (29 tests):
  ShardedMap CRUD roundtrips, len/is_empty invariants, insert_if_absent,
  retain correctness, keys/values/entries consistency, PaneMap equivalents,
  DistributionStats invariants and serde roundtrip.

- proptest_sharded_counter (18 tests):
  Counter sum/increment/shard_values/reset, max tracking/monotonicity/idempotency,
  gauge set/get/reset, ShardedSnapshot serde, AtomicU64 shim consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
